content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "Bringing a Document",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，我來拿文件。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ lái ná wénjiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 lai2 na2 wen2jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I've come to pick up a document.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 서류를 가지러 왔습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，請等一下。我幫你拿出來。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng děng yīxià. Wǒ bāng nǐ ná chūlái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 deng3 yi1xia4. Wo3 bang1 ni3 na2 chu1lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please wait a moment. I'll take it out for you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 잠시만 기다려 주세요. 제가 꺼내 드리겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝。這份文件要帶回去給老闆。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Zhè fèn wénjiàn yào dài huíqù gěi lǎobǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5. Zhe4 fen4 wen2jian4 yao4 dai4 hui2qu4 gei3 lao3ban3.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. This document needs to be taken back to the boss.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 이 서류는 사장님께 가져가야 합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題。你拿好，別弄丟了。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Nǐ ná hǎo, bié nòng diū le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2. Ni3 na2 hao3, bie2 nong4 diu1 le5.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. Hold it carefully, don't lose it.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 잘 챙기세요, 잃어버리지 마세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的，謝謝你。我現在就帶回去。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxie nǐ. Wǒ xiànzài jiù dài huíqù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xie4xie5 ni3. Wo3 xian4zai4 jiu4 dai4 hui2qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. I'll take it back now.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 지금 바로 가져가겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the person come to pick up?",
          "question_ko": "그 사람은 무엇을 가지러 왔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["A book", "A document", "A phone"],
          "options_ko": ["책", "서류", "휴대폰"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the direction verbs like 拿出來 and 帶回去.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: 'I came to pick up a document and will take it back to the office.'"
    },
    {
      "title": "Taking Food Out",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我要外帶。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào wàidài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 yao4 wai4dai4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to take out.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 포장하겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問你要點什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nǐ yào diǎn shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3wen4 ni3 yao4 dian3 shen2me5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what would you like to order?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 무엇을 주문하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要一份牛肉麵，帶回去吃。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào yī fèn niúròumiàn, dài huíqù chī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 yi1 fen4 niu2rou4mian4, dai4 hui2qu4 chi1.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like one beef noodle soup, to take home and eat.",
          "translation_ko": "소고기 국수 한 그릇 주문할게요, 집에 가져가서 먹을 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，我幫你拿出來打包。請等一下。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nǐ ná chūlái dǎbāo. Qǐng děng yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 bang1 ni3 na2 chu1lai2 da3bao1. Qing3 deng3 yi1xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll take it out and pack it for you. Please wait a moment.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 꺼내서 포장해 드리겠습니다. 잠시만 기다려 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。我還要一杯紅茶，一起帶去。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie. Wǒ hái yào yī bēi hóngchá, yīqǐ dài qù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5. Wo3 hai2 yao4 yi1 bei1 hong2cha2, yi1qi3 dai4 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I also want a black tea, to take together.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 홍차 한 잔도 같이 가져갈게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題。總共一百五十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Zǒnggòng yībǎi wǔshí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2. Zong3gong4 yi1bai3 wu3shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. Total is 150 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 총 150원입니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Rice and tea", "Noodles and black tea", "Coffee and cake"],
          "options_ko": ["밥과 차", "국수와 홍차", "커피와 케이크"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, paying attention to 外帶, 帶回去, and 帶去.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice ordering takeout: 'I want one beef noodle soup and a black tea to take out.'"
    },
    {
      "title": "Come Back Later",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我現在有事，可以晚一點再回來嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiànzài yǒu shì, kěyǐ wǎn yīdiǎn zài huílái ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si5, wo3 xian4zai4 you3 shi4, ke3yi3 wan3 yi1dian3 zai4 hui2lai2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I have something to do now. Can I come back a little later?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 지금 볼일이 있어서 조금 늦게 다시 와도 될까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "可以啊。你要帶什麼東西回去嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ a. Nǐ yào dài shénme dōngxī huíqù ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3 a5. Ni3 yao4 dai4 shen2me5 dong1xi1 hui2qu4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Sure. Do you need to take anything back?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 괜찮습니다. 가져가실 물건이 있으신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用，我只是先來看一下。等一下再回來拿。",
          "pinyin": "Bùyòng, wǒ zhǐshì xiān lái kàn yīxià. Děng yīxià zài huílái ná.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4yong4, wo3 zhi3shi4 xian1 lai2 kan4 yi1xia4. Deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 hui2lai2 na2.",
          "translation_en": "No need, I just came to take a look first. I'll come back later to pick it up.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 그냥 먼저 와서 좀 봤어요. 나중에 다시 와서 찾겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，沒問題。你慢慢來。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, méi wèntí. Nǐ mànman lái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, mei2 wen4ti2. Ni3 man4man5 lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, no problem. Take your time.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 문제없습니다. 천천히 오세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，我大概半小時後回來。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, wǒ dàgài bàn xiǎoshí hòu huílái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5, wo3 da4gai4 ban4 xiao3shi2 hou4 hui2lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'll be back in about half an hour.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 약 30분 후에 다시 오겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the customer come back later?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 왜 나중에 다시 왔습니까?",
          "options_en": ["He had something to do", "He forgot something", "He was hungry"],
          "options_ko": ["볼일이 있어서", "무언가를 잊어서", "배가 고파서"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence, focusing on 回來 and 回去.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: 'I have something to do now, I'll come back later to pick it up.'"
    }
  ]
}
